Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: Medicare Part D Plan Characteristics (2007-2014) │ October 2021 │ V 1.4 185 

GAP_PARTIAL_TIER_05 

LABEL: Partial Gap Coverage on Tier 5 

DESCRIPTION: This variable indicates whether the Part D plans that offer some cost sharing in the gap (i.e., those 
where the GAP_TIER value for this tier = "Y" [yes]), this variable indicates whether or not the cost 
sharing applies to a partial list of drugs. 

If only a limited number of drugs on the tier are
